summary: Well-structured test suite with comprehensive unit and workflow testing, but significant gaps in error-path rigor. Unit tests (Aggregate-TestResults.Tests.ps1) thoroughly exercise all public functions: XML/JSON parsing, status normalization, aggregation, flaky detection, and markdown generation. Workflow tests validate YAML structure, actionlint compliance, and end-to-end act execution with exact output assertions (e.g., 'Total=18 Passed=11'). Design is solid: proper isolation with temp directories/GUIDs, clean BeforeAll/AfterAll, logical Describe grouping. Critical weakness: test references fixture dirs (fixtures/case-mixed, fixtures/case-green) with hardcoded expected values (18 records, 1.80s duration) but fixtures not shown in provided code—tests cannot pass without these. Additional gaps: no tests for file permission errors, Unicode/special chars in test names, env variable edge cases (GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY missing), AppendStepSummary parameter behavior, empty fixture directories, negative durations, or concurrent execution. Would catch regressions on happy path but would miss most error scenarios. Act workflow integration is strong but workflow error handling is untested.
